meta.title: Cosmetics Store
meta.subtitle: All purchasable items are cosmetic-only. No gameplay advantages.

instructions: Pay securely on the payment page.
After payment, the Paper server automatically grants your cosmetic permission.

categories.label: Ranks (Cosmetic)
categories.note: Chat tag, name color, tab styling.

products.name: Knight
products.description: Gold name + [KNIGHT] tag + chat styling (cosmetic only).
products.delivery: Granted automatically after payment is confirmed.

products.name: Warlord
products.description: Premium tag, name styling, and tab flare (still cosmetic only).
products.delivery: Granted automatically after payment is confirmed.

products.name: Ember Aura
products.description: Soft ember particles around your character.
products.delivery: Unlocks the ember particle permission on the Paper server.

products.name: Baby Slime Pet
products.description: A tiny slime follows you (cosmetic only).
products.delivery: Unlocks the baby slime pet permission on the Paper server.
